title: How Anthropic Employees ACTUALLY Use Claude Code to Grow
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Anthropic's Growth Team used Claude Code to accelerate company growth from one billion to nineteen billion dollars in fourteen months. He identifies four key strategies: automating existing workflows, enabling previously sub-threshold work, building custom tools, and using AI as a thought partner, plus one common failure mode where AI creates additional work.
